lineage.Process: Merge 'D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\Williston\Boundary\willistonnewboundary.shp';'D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Watershed Boundaries\PeaceCanyonNew.shp' "D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\Temp\WillPeace.shp" "ID 'ID' true true false 10 Double 0 10 ,First,#,D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\Williston\Boundary\willistonnewboundary.shp,ID,-1,-1,D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Watershed Boundaries\PeaceCanyonNew.shp,ID,-1,-1;COUNT 'COUNT' true true false 11 Double 0 11 ,First,#,D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\Williston\Boundary\willistonnewboundary.shp,COUNT,-1,-1,D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Watershed Boundaries\PeaceCanyonNew.shp,COUNT,-1,-1;FID_Export 'FID_Export' true true false 9 Long 0 9 ,First,#,D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Watershed Boundaries\PeaceCanyonNew.shp,FID_Export,-1,-1;FID_willis 'FID_willis' true true false 9 Long 0 9 ,First,#,D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Watershed Boundaries\PeaceCanyonNew.shp,FID_willis,-1,-1;ID_1 'ID_1' true true false 10 Double 0 10 ,First,#,D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Watershed Boundaries\PeaceCanyonNew.shp,ID_1,-1,-1;COUNT_1 'COUNT_1' true true false 11 Double 0 11 ,First,#,D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Watershed Boundaries\PeaceCanyonNew.shp,COUNT_1,-1,-1"
Union "'D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\Temp\WillPeace.shp' #;'D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\Temp\Export_Output.shp' #" "D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\Temp\PeaceAll.shp" ALL # GAPS
Union "'D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\MoberlyRiver.shp' #;'D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Watershed Boundaries\SiteCNewCopy.shp' #" "D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\Temp\Temp.shp" ALL # GAPS
Union "C:\Users\sweston\Desktop\HalfwayLowerSubBasin.shp #;'D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Site C\HalfwayRiver.shp' #" "D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\Temp\HalfwayTemp.shp" ALL # GAPS

Union "'D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Site C\HalfwayUpperSubBasin.shp' #;'D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Watershed Boundaries\AllWatersheds.shp' #" "D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\Temp\Temp26.shp" ALL # GAPS
Dissolve "D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\Temp\Temp26.shp" "D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Watershed Boundaries\AllWatersheds.shp" WS_CODE "FIRST_FIRS FIRST" MULTI_PART DISSOLVE_LINES

Merge H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp;'D:\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Watershed Boundaries\ClaytonFallsBoundary.shp' C:\Users\sweston\Desktop\AllWatershedsUTM.shp "WS_CODE "WS_CODE" true true false 45 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,WS_CODE,-1,-1;FIRST_FIRS "FIRST_FIRS" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,FIRST_FIRS,-1,-1;PPST_1 "PPST_1" true true false 3 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPST_1,-1,-1;PPWGHT_1 "PPWGHT_1" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPWGHT_1,-1,-1;PPST_2 "PPST_2" true true false 3 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPST_2,-1,-1;PPWGHT_2 "PPWGHT_2" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPWGHT_2,-1,-1;PPST_3 "PPST_3" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPST_3,-1,-1;PPWGHT_3 "PPWGHT_3" true true false 4 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPWGHT_3,-1,-1;TST_1 "TST_1" true true false 3 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TST_1,-1,-1;TWGHT_1 "TWGHT_1" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TWGHT_1,-1,-1;TST_2 "TST_2" true true false 3 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TST_2,-1,-1;TWGHT_2 "TWGHT_2" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TWGHT_2,-1,-1;TST_3 "TST_3" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TST_3,-1,-1;TWGHT_3 "TWGHT_3" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TWGHT_3,-1,-1"
Dissolve H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp C:\Users\sweston\Desktop\Gay.shp FIRST_FIRS # MULTI_PART DISSOLVE_LINES

Merge C:\Users\sweston\Desktop\Export_Output.shp;H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp C:\Users\sweston\Desktop\AllWatershedsUT.shp "FIRST_FIRS "FIRST_FIRS" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,C:\Users\sweston\Desktop\Export_Output.shp,FIRST_FIRS,-1,-1,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,FIRST_FIRS,-1,-1;WS_CODE "WS_CODE" true true false 45 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,WS_CODE,-1,-1;PPST_1 "PPST_1" true true false 3 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPST_1,-1,-1;PPWGHT_1 "PPWGHT_1" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPWGHT_1,-1,-1;PPWGHT_2 "PPWGHT_2" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPWGHT_2,-1,-1;PPST_3 "PPST_3" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPST_3,-1,-1;TST_1 "TST_1" true true false 3 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TST_1,-1,-1;TWGHT_1 "TWGHT_1" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TWGHT_1,-1,-1;TWGHT_2 "TWGHT_2" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TWGHT_2,-1,-1;TST_3 "TST_3" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TST_3,-1,-1;TWGHT_3 "TWGHT_3" true true false 5 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TWGHT_3,-1,-1;PPST_4 "PPST_4" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPST_4,-1,-1;TST_4 "TST_4" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TST_4,-1,-1;PPWGHT_4 "PPWGHT_4" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPWGHT_4,-1,-1;TWGHT_4 "TWGHT_4" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TWGHT_4,-1,-1;PPWGHT_3 "PPWGHT_3" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPWGHT_3,-1,-1;PPST_2 "PPST_2" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,PPST_2,-1,-1;TST_2 "TST_2" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,H:\AllWatershedsUTM.shp,TST_2,-1,-1"

idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 3; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.3.0.1770

descript.abstract: REQUIRED: A brief narrative summary of the data set.
descript.purpose: REQUIRED: A summary of the intentions with which the data set was developed.

citeinfo.origin: REQUIRED: The name of an organization or individual that developed the data set.
citeinfo.pubdate: REQUIRED: The date when the data set is published or otherwise made available for release.
citeinfo.title: Temp

timeperd.current: REQUIRED: The basis on which the time period of content information is determined.

sngdate.caldate: REQUIRED: The year (and optionally month, or month and day) for which the data set corresponds to the ground.

status.progress: REQUIRED: The state of the data set.
status.update: REQUIRED: The frequency with which changes and additions are made to the data set after the initial data set is completed.

bounding.westbc: REQUIRED: Western-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in longitude.
bounding.eastbc: REQUIRED: Eastern-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in longitude.
bounding.northbc: REQUIRED: Northern-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in latitude.
bounding.southbc: REQUIRED: Southern-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in latitude.

theme.themekt: REQUIRED: Reference to a formally registered thesaurus or a similar authoritative source of theme keywords.
theme.themekey: REQUIRED: Common-use word or phrase used to describe the subject of the data set.

idinfo.accconst: REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for accessing the data set.
idinfo.useconst: REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for using the data set after access is granted.

dataIdInfo.envirDesc: Microsoft Windows 7 Version 6.1 (Build 7601) Service Pack 1; Esri ArcGIS 10.5.1.7333

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

cntorgp.cntper: REQUIRED: The person responsible for the metadata information.
cntorgp.cntorg: REQUIRED: The organization responsible for the metadata information.

cntaddr.addrtype: REQUIRED: The mailing and/or physical address for the organization or individual.
cntaddr.city: REQUIRED: The city of the address.
cntaddr.state: REQUIRED: The state or province of the address.
cntaddr.postal: REQUIRED: The ZIP or other postal code of the address.

cntinfo.cntvoice: REQUIRED: The telephone number by which individuals can speak to the organization or individual.

onLineSrc.linkage: file://\\HY143071\D$\Data\UBCWM Calibration 2008\BC Data\Watershed Boundaries\Site C Sub-basins\HalfwayRiver

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
